title: DittoBench ChallengeRequest
description: JSON payload validators write to the miner harness stdin, one per line. Mirrors bittensor.ChallengeRequest in go/bittensor/types.go.

challenge_id.description: Validator-chosen opaque ID; not the fixture case ID. Re-issued per challenge.

mechanism.description: Which on-chain mechanism this case scores.

case_id.description: Fixture ID; may be the canary paraphrase of a public case.

domain.description: DittoCore-only user-facing domain bucket; absent for ditto_retrieval.

tool_schemas.description: Canonical Ditto chat v2 tool schemas; the harness MUST NOT introduce other tools.

stm_context.description: STM turns injected into the conversation history.

k.description: Top-K for retrieval; the harness returns at most k evidence IDs.

user_fixture_id.description: Seeded fixture user the retrieval query targets.

fixture_bundle.description: Optional content-addressed handle (e.g. ipfs://...) for the seeded corpus.

include_answer.description: If true, the harness must produce a final_answer in addition to evidence_ids.

validator_seed.description: Per-challenge randomness; the harness MUST echo this back unchanged.

issued_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp the challenge was issued.

deadline_ms.description: Hard wall-clock budget in milliseconds. Responses received after this are scored as zero.
